nodes.name: 刚果共和国
nodes.summary: 刚果共和国是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联20种鸟类，包括Black guinea fowl、Scaly spurfowl、Yellow-billed turaco等20种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 科特迪瓦

nodes.name: 鹮科
nodes.summary: 鹮科（Threskiornithidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联30种鸟类，如朱鹮、黑脸琵鹭、Plumbeous ibis等30种鸟类。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 斑胸䴉
nodes.summary: 斑胸䴉（Spot-breasted ibis，学名 Bostrychia rara），分类上属于鹈形目，并归入鹮科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联16个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

nodes.name: Ernst Hartert

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The spot-breasted ibis (Bostrychia rara) is a small, forest-dwelling ibis found in African lowland forests and swampy forested areas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The spot-breasted ibis (Bostrychia rara) is a small, forest-dwelling ibis found in African lowland forests and swampy forested areas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The spot-breasted ibis (Bostrychia rara) is a small, forest-dwelling ibis found in African lowland forests and swampy forested areas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The spot-breasted ibis is found in Angola, Cameroon, Central African Republic, the Republic of the Congo, the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Ivory Coast, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, Ghana, Guinea, Liberia, Nigeria, Sierra Leone, and Uganda. Although it is found across a wide range of territory is it not common and considered to be rare. In the areas where it is found it is a resident of that area, this means as a species they do not migrate and they live there all year long. Its habitat is in wooded swamps or forested areas near streams
